msg_select_to_delete: Please select a camera to delete.
msg_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete camera %q?
menu_record_single: Start recording for this camera only
msg_lang_restart: The application needs to be restarted to change the language. Do you confirm?
close_message: What would you like to do?
record_processing: Processing videos, please do not close the application...
record_locked_msg: Camera, stream, layout, and recording-folder settings are locked until recording stops.
tutorial_desc_0: NystaVision lets you monitor and record multiple cameras simultaneously. This short tour will help you get started quickly.
tutorial_desc_1: Click the + button to add a new camera. Both IP cameras (RTSP) and USB webcams are supported.
tutorial_desc_2: The "Start All" button starts all active cameras simultaneously. Right-click on a camera to manage individual cameras.
tutorial_desc_3: Use the Record button to record all cameras at once. When you stop recording, you will be asked for a patient name and a separate video will be created for each camera.
tutorial_desc_4: Use the ⚙ button to configure application settings. Here you can change the **Language**, enable **Auto-Start on Boot**, choose the **Recordings Folder**, toggle **Hardware Acceleration**, and configure the **Recording Mode** (Instant or Separate). You can reopen this tour at any time with the ? button.
disk_warning_msg:
Approximately %.1f minutes of recording space is left in the selected recordings directory.

Would you like to free up space or choose another location?
disk_blocked_msg:
There is not enough space for even a 1-minute video in the selected recordings directory.

Please free up disk space or choose another location.
disk_auto_stop_msg: Disk space exhausted! Recording has been stopped automatically.
usb_bandwidth_error_msg:
%s camera failed to start with 'No space left on device' (USB Bandwidth Exhaustion) error.

This error is not related to RAM or disk space. Your computer's USB controller cannot handle the data stream from all connected cameras simultaneously.

To resolve this:
1. Distribute the cameras to different USB ports (e.g. plug some to the front, some to the back, or use USB 3.0/blue ports).
2. Lower the resolution or FPS of the cameras in the Settings menu (e.g. from 30 to 15).
3. If you are using a USB hub/splitter, disconnect it and plug the cameras directly into separate ports on the computer.
layout_delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete layout %q?
tutorial_desc_5: Use the Layouts button to save the camera list, window size, and split dividers with a custom name. You can load or delete them from the list with a single click.
tutorial_desc_6: Right-click any camera panel to edit its name, type, source, resolution, FPS, or start recording for that camera only.
lbl_composite_on_desc:
All cameras are recorded into a single video at the same time. As soon as you stop recording, the video is instantly ready — no waiting required. Individual camera videos are separated automatically in the background.

• Ideal for low and mid-range devices
• No waiting after recording stops
• Smooth recording at 60 FPS
• Per-camera resolution/FPS cannot be customized (each camera is recorded at a fixed size)
lbl_composite_off_desc:
Each camera is recorded separately. After recording stops, videos are processed and combined; this may take a while depending on your device and the recording length.

• Custom resolution and FPS can be set per camera
• Requires a powerful device
• Post-recording processing time can be long
record_composite_done_msg:
Recording complete!
Video is ready. Individual camera videos are being separated in the background.
msg_composite_format_disabled: Resolution is managed automatically because Instant Recording Mode is on. (Turn it off in Settings to change this)
err_min_glasses: At least 1 glasses camera is required.
err_min_environment: At least 1 environment camera is required.
